keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY APPETITE. Appetite, affected , changed, in general : Ant-c., Ars., Calc-c., Chin., Cina., Grap., Iod., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Petr., Pho., Pul., Sil., Sul., Ver-a. Appetite, craves , coarse, raw food, chalk, etc. : Alu., Calc-c., Cic., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Psor., Sil., Tarn. Appetite, craves, condiments, spices : Ars., Chel., Chin., Flu-ac., Hep., Pho., Pul., Sang., Sul. Appetite, hunger : Calc-c., Chin., Cina., Grap., Pho., Pul., Sep., Stan. Appetite, hunger, 11 A.M. : Pho., Sul. Appetite, hunger, attacks of sickness, before : Bry., Nux-v., Pho., Psor., Sep. Appetite, hunger, eating, after : Cina., Lyc. Appetite, hunger, headache, with : Pho., Psor. Appetite, hunger, ravenous : Calc-c., Chin., Cina., Iod., Lyc., Nux-v., Pho., Psor., Saba., Sil., Sul., Ver-a. Appetite, hunger, relish, without : Nat-m., Op., Rhus-t. Appetite, nibbling : Aeth., Calc-c., Mag-m., Nat-c., Petr., Rhus-t. Appetite, variable , capricious : Calc-c., Cina., Coc-c., Gran., Iod., Lach., Nat-m., Petr., Pho., Syph. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
